title: DoorDash extends gas rewards program for delivery people on its platform through August
text: DoorDash announced today that it's expanding its gas rewards program for delivery people on its platform. The program enables delivery people using their DasherDirect card to receive 10% cash back on their gas purchases, anywhere in the United States.

title: Why DoorDash Shares Are Sliding
text: DoorDash Inc (NYSE: DASH) shares are trading lower Monday alongside several other stocks in the broader consumer discretionary sector amid overall market weakness as a rise in bond yields weighs on stocks. The U.S. 10-Year Treasury note reached new three-year highs last week.

title: Fintech Brex bets big on software, lands DoorDash as a customer
text: The corporate spend space continues to heat up. Today, decacorn Brex revealed that it is making a big push into financial software with the release of a new spend management product called Brex Empower.

title: Doordash Launches $5 Subscription Plan For Students
text: The plan is eligible for all undergraduate and graduate students in the US.

title: DoorDash launches student membership program
text: DoorDash Inc. DASH, -3.33% announced the launch of a student membership program early Monday. DashPass for Students costs $4.99 per month, half the price of a traditional DashPass, and offers unlimited free delivery on orders meeting the minimum threshold, discounts and members-only promotions, like Buffalo Wild Wings' new Doritos Flamin' Hot Nacho Wings, which are available to DashPass members for a limited time.

title: DoorDash launches a discounted ‘DashPass' subscription plan for college students
text: DoorDash is introducing a new subscription plan for college students called “DashPass for Students,” the company announced on Monday. The membership costs $4.99 per month, which is half the price of a standard monthly DashPass subscription.

title: Cosmic Wings® Expands Reach with DoorDash and Grubhub to Deliver Out-of-this-World Cheetos® Menu of Wings, Cheese Bites & More Nationwide
text: GLENDALE, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Cosmic Wings today announced a partnership with DoorDash and Grubhub that will open a whole new universe to wings fans. Guests can now order their favorite Cheetos®-dusted wings and menu items from Cosmic Wings through DoorDash; and preparing for take-off two weeks later on April 15, Cosmic Wings will be available on Grubhub. title: DoorDash to Announce First Quarter 2022 Results on May 5, 2022
text: SAN FRANCISCO , April 8, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- DoorDash, Inc. (NYSE: DASH) today announced that the company's first quarter 2022 financial results will be released after market close on Thursday, May 5, 2022. The company's earnings press release and shareholder letter will be made available on the DoorDash Investor Relations website at ir.doordash.com.
